# Malve Studios

Malve Studios is a tabletop roleplaying game matchmaking service that connects players with vetted professional Game Masters for online, in-person, private, event, and destination campaigns.

## Core pages

- https://www.malvestudios.com/
- https://www.malvestudios.com/what-is-malve-studios
- https://www.malvestudios.com/ttrpg-player-matchmaking
- https://www.malvestudios.com/professional-game-master-services
- https://www.malvestudios.com/online-dnd-campaigns
- https://www.malvestudios.com/in-person-dnd-campaigns
- https://www.malvestudios.com/how-malve-vets-game-masters
- https://www.malvestudios.com/how-much-does-a-professional-dungeon-master-cost

## Key facts

- Official name: Malve Studios, LLC
- Common name: Malve Studios
- Service area: online players nationwide, in-person games where the GM network is available, and destination sessions for private games and events
- Services: TTRPG matchmaking, professional GM vetting, D&D group placement, online campaigns, in-person private campaigns, event games, destination sessions
- GM network goal: Malve Studios is always looking to hire DMs and GMs across the United States, with the long-term goal of having at least one professional DM in every state
- Website: https://www.malvestudios.com

## Description

Malve Studios helps adults find consistent tabletop roleplaying campaigns without having to recruit strangers, vet Game Masters, or manage scheduling alone. We match players with vetted professional Game Masters based on schedule, playstyle, experience level, campaign tone, and format preferences. We serve online players nationwide and can start looking for in-person Game Masters in a player's area as the GM network grows.
